long_description:
NRE were alerted of link between fas04b.sr01.par06 Et26/1 <-> fcs87b.sr01.par06 Et52/1 going down. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19771
short_description: fas04b.sr01.par06 Et26/1 <-> fcs87b.sr01.par06 Et52/1 | Link Down
close_notes: Link shut to mitigate any further impact. Will proceed to do Layer1 troubleshooting to resolve any issues with the link before adding it back to service. (Note: This incident was resolved via automation.)
